name: Migration Dry-Run Planner
shortDescription: Generates dry-run and rollback-aware migration execution plans.
longDescription: Builds deterministic migration plans with preflight, dry-run, rollback, and validation checkpoints before production execution.
author: ARS Ops

outputs.name: dry_run_plan
outputs.description: Stepwise staged migration plan with dry-run steps.

includedAssets.name: scripts/validate_dry_run_plan.py
includedAssets.description: Validates that dry-run plans include mandatory safety sections.

includedAssets.name: references/dry-run-checklist.md
includedAssets.description: Checklist for dry-run readiness and evidence capture.

includedAssets.name: references/rollback-query-template.md
includedAssets.description: Template queries for rollback and data validation.

failureModes: Rollback steps missing ownership or timing constraints.

examples.title: Orders table migration dry-run
examples.summary: Builds phased dry-run with validation queries and rollback triggers.
examples.outputPreview: Dry-run and rollback plan with required checkpoints

changelog.summary: Initial release for migration dry-run planning workflow.
